title: Liberation Gita
author: Av Neryah
description: A powerful spiritual transmission of pure bliss and nondual realization, straight from the heart of the Unborn. This book carries the distilled essence of the world's great nondual traditions. It is a piercing revelation from the grace of liberation, a luminous descent of nondual wisdom manifested into poetic fire. It takes you on an inner pilgrimage through silence, love, bliss, awe, tears, devotion, dissolution, and freedom. Each chapter is like a supernova, ready to shatter your mind while making your whole being tremble in rapture. But you should know: This book will not explain anything or seek to satisfy the mind, but rather transmit the beauty of awakening and liberation. These pages are not for the curious or casual, but for the earnest, the ripe, the ready. Liberation Gita may be one of the most intimate nondual works you will ever encounter-a companion to return again and again. Not all fires burn the skin. Some burn the veil that keeps you dreaming. If you feel the heat, step in.
